title: The Dangers of Sugary Sodas
summary: How hidden acids in soft drinks erode your tooth enamel over time.
content: Every time you sip a soda, your teeth are under attack for 20 minutes.Therefore,the No.1 thing to do is two rinse your mouth with water after drinking soda!

title: First Aid for Heat Stroke
summary: Essential steps to take during the hottest months in Isiolo.
content: If someone feels dizzy and has stopped sweating, move them to the shade immediately...
